citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The attending veterinarian has not visited the facility in the last year. The program of veterinary care states that regularly
scheduled visits by the veterinarian will be completed annually, however, a veterinary visit has not occurred since June
25, 2024.
It's important to follow the program of veterinary care and have regularly scheduled visits by the veterinarian to ensure
that the animals are receiving proper medical care, and that the veterinarian is familiar with the animals and facility in
order to provide appropriate veterinary guidance.
The licensee must follow their program of veterinary care including regularly scheduled veterinary visits to the premises.
Correct by: May 8, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a family member.
n

narrative:
2.40(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The attending veterinarian has not visited the facility in the last year. The program of veterinary care states that regularly 
scheduled visits by the veterinarian will be completed annually, however, a veterinary visit has not occurred since June 
25, 2024. 
It's important to follow the program of veterinary care and have regularly scheduled visits by the veterinarian to ensure 
that the animals are receiving proper medical care, and that the veterinarian is familiar with the animals and facility in 
order to provide appropriate veterinary guidance. 
The licensee must follow their program of veterinary care including regularly scheduled veterinary visits to the premises. 
Correct by: May 8, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a family member. 
 
 n
